title: Lava of regeneraion
description: Minecraft, but lava will give you "Regeneration" effect
body:
Simple data pack that adds a new game mechanic - lava will give you a "regeneration" effect!
You can install it for Minecraft 1.20 and up. If someone don't know how to install this data pack, read this:
# How to install:
- Download data pack
- Launch minecraft
- Click "Create new world"
- Click "More" and select "data packs"
- Drag .zip archive into "data packs" page
- Enjoy :)
# How to install on server:
- Download data pack
- Open your server page (Aternos, ScalaCube etc.)
- Open 'files' page
- Open world > datapacks folder
- Drag downloaded data pack into this folder
- Start the server and enjoy :)
